notes: All records here are generated by Fixtures/documents/generate.swift - synthetic data only, NO real PII (Constitution Art. 15). Nationality/issuing state is fixed to the ICAO-reserved fictitious code 'UTO' (Utopia); names are drawn from an obviously-synthetic word list; emails use IANA-reserved example.com/.org/.net domains (RFC 2606); phone numbers use the NANP-reserved 555-01XX fictional range.

This manifest describes DATA records only, not rendered PDF/image artifacts: PDFium is not buildable on this machine yet (tasks/escalations/E-004-pdfium-build-infeasible-on-this-machine.md), so there is no rasterizer available to turn these records into a visual passport/license/resume PDF. See Fixtures/documents/README.md.

generator_version bumps whenever generate.swift's output format or algorithm changes; regenerate this v1 set with the exact seed below to reproduce it byte-for-byte (Scripts/bench.sh generator-determinism checks this property).

kinds.format: ICAO 9303 TD3 (2 lines x 44 chars), check digits verified
ICAO 9303 TD1 (3 lines x 30 chars), check digits verified - modeled as an MRZ-bearing ID-card document, not a specific US state's PDF417 barcode license (see README)
plain structured record, no MRZ (resumes have no standardized machine-readable check-digit scheme)
